sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111052" key="fili/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλίων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[λῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φίλος</ref> </xr> IV.</sense> </entryFree>
